reasoning: Stock prices over a short horizon typically follow a random walk, so probabilities should be anchored around 0.5. Short-term trend estimates from Yahoo Finance show slight downward momentum, leading to a minor reduction for the immediate March prediction. Equity drift would normally push mid-term dates slightly above 0.5. However, Comcast officially announced it will spin off a portfolio of its cable channels into a new publicly traded company, and they expect to complete this by 'late 2025' or approximately one year from November 2024. Typical resolution criteria for stock prediction questions do not adjust for spin-offs (only stock splits and reverse splits are adjusted), meaning CMCSA's stock price will experience a structural mechanical drop on the spin-off's ex-date by the value of the spun-off entity. Because of this impending mechanical drag, the probabilities for late 2025 and early 2026 are adjusted slightly downward below neutral drift. Per instructions, all values remain tightly clustered near 0.5.
